series_metadata.series_description: Plants, lumber, grain, seeds, and agricultural products shipped out of the state of Ohio to another state or country are inspected by Plant Pest Control Personnel and receive certification for shipment.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: originals are scanned into PPC drive and will be retained electronically. ; Electronic: All Phytosanitary Certificates are completed electronically and stored electronically indefinitely in a system called PCIT administered by USDA / APHIS. They will be retained indefinitely per PCIT system
